name: JSF++: Should-Rule Deviation Approved
description: Breaking a 'should' (advisory) rule is approved by the software engineering lead.
rationale: JSF++ AV Rule 4: to break a 'should' rule, approval must be received from the software engineering lead.
source: JSF Air Vehicle C++ Coding Standards (Lockheed Martin, Doc. 2RDU00001 Rev C, Dec 2005). https://www.stroustrup.com/JSF-AV-rules.pdf
